risks.title: Duplicate event stream causing noise
risks.evidence: 4 events for same file (Security.tsx) within 17ms; 2 pairs with near-identical timestamps (1ms apart, ~17s apart). Duplicate tags present on low-relevance events.
risks.recommendedAction: Implement event deduplication logic in code-observer to suppress duplicate modifications within 5s window

risks.title: Security file modifications require verification
risks.evidence: High-relevance events (0.95, 0.85) flagging changes to Security.tsx—a sensitive authentication/permissions component
risks.recommendedAction: Review current Security.tsx changes and enforce security-focused code review before merge

opportunities.title: Establish security-file monitoring
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx modifications detected with high relevance; security files warrant automated testing and flagging
opportunities.suggestedAction: Create automated CI/CD step to run security tests whenever src/screens/Security.tsx changes

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx changes
taskCandidates.description: Inspect the modifications to /home/riad/github/kairos/src/screens/Security.tsx for correctness, security issues, and proper test coverage
taskCandidates.rationale: High-relevance security file modifications detected; needs human verification

taskCandidates.title: Deduplicate event monitoring stream
taskCandidates.description: Implement deduplication in code-observer to filter duplicate file-change events within short time windows
taskCandidates.rationale: Reduces noise; improves signal quality; prevents action fatigue

recommendations.title: Enable security module CI checks
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx is a sensitive component; automated testing reduces risk of regressions
recommendations.action: Configure GitHub Actions to run security-focused linting and tests on src/screens/Security.tsx changes

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx changes
